content.text:
```mdl
@ Agreement on the non‑disclosure of confidential information (two‑way)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_15_nda_2

open std.strings

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types – domain concepts
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – definition of “confidential information”
type InfoCategory = Technical | NonTechnical

type ConfidentialInfo = {
    category : InfoCategory,          -- technical vs. non‑technical
    description : string              -- free‑text description
}

@ Clause 1 – parties to the agreement
type DisclosingParty = {
    name    : string,
    address : string
}

type ReceivingParty = {
    name    : string,
    address : string,
    -- obligations of the receiving party (boolean flags)
    has_taken_measures          : bool,   -- a) reasonable measures
    uses_for_commercial         : bool,   -- b) commercial use
    discloses_to_third_party    : bool,   -- c) disclosure to third parties
    makes_copy                  : bool,   -- e) copying/abstracting
    acknowledges_source        : bool,   -- f) source acknowledgment
    retained_for_ten_years     : bool    -- 5) 10‑year retention period
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – public model objects (stable, singular, noun‑phrases)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – the disclosing party
entity disclosing_party : DisclosingParty

@ Clause 1 – the receiving party
entity receiving_party : ReceivingParty

@ Clause 1 – a piece of confidential information covered by the agreement
entity confidential_item : ConfidentialInfo

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions – pure, reusable predicates
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – technical‑information predicate
func is_technical(info : ConfidentialInfo) -> bool:
    info.category = InfoCategory.Technical

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – deontic requirements (O = obligation, F = prohibition)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – hypothesis: “Confidential Information shall only include technical information.”
rule O confidential_info_is_technical:
    is_technical(confidential_item) always

@ Clause 3a – reasonable measures to keep confidentiality
rule O receiving_party_take_measures:
    receiving_party.has_taken_measures always

@ Clause 3b – prohibition on commercial use without licence
rule F receiving_party_use_for_commercial:
    not receiving_party.uses_for_commercial always

@ Clause 3c – prohibition on disclosure to third parties without permission
rule F receiving_party_disclose_to_third:
    not receiving_party.discloses_to_third_party always

@ Clause 3e – prohibition on copying/abstracting without permission
rule F receiving_party_make_copy:
    not receiving_party.makes_copy always

@ Clause 3f – obligation to acknowledge source and mark “Confidential”
rule O receiving_party_acknowledge_source:
    receiving_party.acknowledges_source always

@ Clause 5 – ten‑year confidentiality period
rule O retention_period:
    receiving_party.retained_for_ten_years always
```
